tb6612fng_init.tooltip: Initialize Grove TB6612FNG motor driver module with I2C address

tb6612fng_dc_run.tooltip: Drive DC motor on specified channel, speed range -255~255, positive for CW, negative for CCW

tb6612fng_dc_brake.tooltip: Immediately brake the DC motor on specified channel

tb6612fng_dc_stop.tooltip: Slowly stop the DC motor on specified channel

tb6612fng_stepper_run.message0:
%1 drive stepper motor mode %2
steps %3 RPM %4
tb6612fng_stepper_run.tooltip: Drive stepper motor, positive steps for CW, negative for CCW, RPM range 1~300

tb6612fng_stepper_keep_run.message0:
%1 stepper keep running mode %2
RPM %3 direction %4
tb6612fng_stepper_keep_run.tooltip: Keep stepper motor running continuously, RPM range 1~300

tb6612fng_standby.tooltip: Motor driver enters standby mode, all motors stop

tb6612fng_not_standby.tooltip: Motor driver exits standby mode, resume normal operation
